The operating system for construction

The operating system for the $17T construction economy.

From the first spark of an idea to the final invoice — AI-native project management, knowledge, and tools.

builders.theknowledgegardens.com  ·  live in production
What's live today

A working product, in production, with builders.

Six phases. Eight user lanes. A unified workflow surface called the Killer App. Three production workflows already running — estimating, code compliance, and gamified step-by-step builds — with voice input on every screen.

The platform shape

Six phases. Eight lanes. One operating system.

The six phases

Every project, end to end. No phase outsourced to a different tool.

Dream→ Design→ Plan→ Build→ Deliver→ Grow

The eight user lanes

Every actor on a project. Including the non-human ones.

Dreamer Homeowners, first-time builders
Builder GCs running projects daily
Specialist Architects, engineers, licensed trades
Merchant Material suppliers, equipment vendors
Ally Inspectors, lenders, insurers, realtors
Crew Skilled labor, on-site workforce
Fleet Heavy equipment, logistics operators
Machine AI agents, drones, construction robots
Machine as a first-class user lane is the differentiator. Most contech is built only for humans. We built for the next decade.
Thesis

Why now, why this, why us.

The construction economy is $17T globally and still runs on PDFs, phone calls, and tribal knowledge. AI just made it possible to encode the implicit expertise of senior builders into systems any team can use. The firms that capture their own knowledge first will compound advantage for decades.

Builder's Knowledge Garden is the layer that lets them do it — across every phase, every trade, every project size, and increasingly, every AI agent and robot on site.

We are not building a point tool. We are building the operating system.

Business model

Free to start. Priced to compound.

From homeowner dream-builders to white-label enterprise. Live pricing today at builders.theknowledgegardens.com.

Explorer
Free forever
Dream Builder, 5 AI queries. The on-ramp for homeowners and first-time builders.
Pro
$49 / mo
Unlimited AI Copilot. Full estimating. Independent operators and small crews.
Team
$199 / mo
Full CRM, project management. The working unit for active GCs.
Enterprise
$499+ / mo
White-label, advanced analytics, SSO. For firms encoding their own playbook.
